apiOrSchemaChanges: GradeNA Grade = -1 (new exported const in domain)
CertificationRecord.Unsupported bool (new exported field on existing struct)
fileMap: internal/domain/dimension.go — modify — add GradeNA constant (-1) and "N/A" mapping
internal/domain/record.go — modify — add Unsupported bool field to CertificationRecord
fixApproach: Two purely additive domain-type changes: (1) In dimension.go, add `const GradeNA Grade = -1` in a separate const block (so existing iota-based Grade constants are not shifted), and add `GradeNA: "N/A"` to the gradeStrings map; (2) In record.go, add `Unsupported bool` to the CertificationRecord struct. Both changes are zero-risk — the zero-value bool defaults to false, preserving all existing behavior. No logic, scorer, pipeline, or report files are touched.
steps: Open internal/domain/dimension.go and locate the existing Grade type, const block, and gradeStrings map
Add a new const block after the existing Grade const block: `const GradeNA Grade = -1`
Add `GradeNA: "N/A"` entry to the gradeStrings map
Open internal/domain/record.go and locate the CertificationRecord struct
Add `Unsupported bool` field to CertificationRecord (append to struct, not insert)
Run `go test ./... -count=1` to confirm all tests pass
summary: Add GradeNA constant (-1 with "N/A" label) to domain/dimension.go and Unsupported bool to CertificationRecord in domain/record.go
